svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="RK0yRA5gWPvzheykyIDg" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-584" dy="-187" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="RAG Pipeline — Ingestion & Query Flows" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="900" x="100" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ing_hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#333333;" value="1. OFFLINE INGESTION PIPELINE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="980" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ing1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Raw Documents
(PDF, HTML, DB, API)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="60" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ing2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Pre-processing
(clean, deduplicate,
normalize)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="270" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ing3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Chunking
(fixed, recursive,
semantic, hierarchical)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="480" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ing4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Embedding
(text-embedding-3,
BGE, E5, Cohere)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="700" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ing5" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;direction=south;" value="Vector Store Index
(Pinecone, Qdrant,
Weaviate, FAISS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="130" x="930" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ing_meta" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;direction=south;" value="Metadata Store
(doc id, source, date)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="130" x="930" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ei1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ing1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="ing2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ei2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ing2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="ing3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ei3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ing3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="ing4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ei4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ing4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="ing5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ei4b" edge="1" parent="1" source="ing4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;" target="ing_meta"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qry_hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#333333;" value="2. ONLINE QUERY PIPELINE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="980" x="60" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="User Query" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="60" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Query Transform
(expand, HyDE,
step-back, multi-query)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="240" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Embed Query
(same model as index)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="450" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Hybrid Retrieval
(vector ANN +
BM25 keyword)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="650" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Reranking
(cross-encoder,
Cohere, Jina)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="860" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Context Assembly
(top-k chunks +
metadata + query)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="860" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="LLM Generation
(OpenAI, Anthropic,
Mistral, Llama)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="640" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Guardrails &
Hallucination Check" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="430" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Final Response
+ Citations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="240" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq1" edge="1" parent="1" source="q1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq2" edge="1" parent="1" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq3" edge="1" parent="1" source="q3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq4" edge="1" parent="1" source="q4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq5" edge="1" parent="1" source="q5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq6" edge="1" parent="1" source="q6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq7" edge="1" parent="1" source="q7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq8" edge="1" parent="1" source="q8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq_vs" edge="1" parent="1" source="ing5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="q4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eval_hdr" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#333333;" value="3. EVALUATION (RAGAS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="980" x="60" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Faithfulness" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="60" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Answer Relevancy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="220" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Context Precision" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="380" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Context Recall" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="540" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Latency & Cost" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="700" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="MRR / NDCG@k" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="860" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
